headlines.title: Moment Trump rushed to safety after gunshots heard at venue
headlines.description: The US president was midway through a conversation before loud bangs rang out at the venue and he was quickly escorted to safety.

headlines.title: What it was like in the room as shots rang out at Washington event
headlines.description: The BBC's Gary O'Donoghue describes the moment he and others dived for cover as shots rang out at the venue.

headlines.title: UK steps up plans for potential shortages caused by Iran war

headlines.title: What we know about the incident

headlines.title: How a crime that never happened sparked anti-immigration unrest

headlines.title: We thought Gen Z weren't drinking. But these cocktails in a ball may suggest otherwise

headlines.title: Trump cancels US envoys' trip to Pakistan for talks on Iran war

headlines.title: A 'bruising week' for Sir Keir and 'Order Andrew to give evidence'
headlines.description: A number of the papers are raiding questions over Sir Keir Starmer's future in politics.

headlines.title: BBC visits Chernobyl ghost city 40 years after world's worst nuclear accident

headlines.title: Homes evacuated after explosion near Northern Ireland police station

headlines.description: After nearly 60 years of marriage, Pam wanted to honour her husband Bill with a hologram at his funeral.

headlines.description: The city's library has the original stuffed animals that inspired the Winnie-the-Pooh collection - except from Roo.

headlines.description: Fan accounts and celebrity update pages are taking over timelines on platforms such as X and TikTok.

headlines.description: Monty Panesar was invited to fill a spot on the Pelsall Cricket Club's first team.

headlines.description: A toddler has been melting hearts talking excitedly about cows with her dad in her Welsh accent.

headlines.title: Meet Herbie, the world's oldest living rabbit
headlines.description: Herbie the lionhead rabbit, from Dorking, has now reached 15 years and 246 days old.

headlines.description: Belfast woman Deby has set herself the target of enabling 100 women to walk on the Moon.

headlines.title: Trophyless to treble? Man City's quest for more history

headlines.title: Why 'muted' England's dominance prompts concern
